headline: Is J. M. Smucker (SJM) Fairly Valued After Its 2% Dividend Increase?
summary: J. M. Smucker (SJM) drew fresh attention after its board approved a 2% increase in the quarterly dividend to $1.12 per share, a move that highlights the company’s current shareholder return approach. See our latest analysis for J. M. Smucker. The dividend increase comes as J. M. Smucker’s share price has built some positive momentum, with a 90 day share price return of 17.51% and a year to date share price return of 16.42%. However, the 3 year total shareholder return declined 17.62%, which...

headline: Does Smucker’s Modest Dividend Hike And New SVP Reframe Its Capital Allocation Story (SJM)?
summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. recently increased its quarterly dividend from US$1.10 to US$1.12 per share, a 2% rise, with the higher payout applying to shareholders of record as of August 14, 2026, and paid on September 1, 2026. This dividend boost, alongside the appointment of veteran supply chain leader Douglas Guilherme as Senior Vice President, highlights management’s emphasis on returning cash to investors while reinforcing operational capabilities. Next, we’ll explore how this dividend...
